allow: PowerShell($proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc -Force; Write-Host "Killed PID $proc" } else { Write-Host "Nothing on 5000" })
Bash(GENERATE_SOURCEMAP=false TERSER_PARALLEL=false NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 CI=true npx react-scripts build)
